---
title: "Bayesian Modeling of Hit Probability by Pitch Location"
author: "Dhillon"
date: "2026-04-12"
output: pdf_document
---

This project uses a Beta-Binomial Bayesian model with a conjugate Beta prior to estimate posterior hit probability in each strike-zone cell. The Goal is to determine where the pitcher should throw the ball for the least amount of hits.

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

data <- read_csv("savant_data.csv")

data <- data %>%
  mutate(hit = ifelse(events %in% c("single", "double", "triple", "home_run"), 1, 0))

data_zone <- data %>%
  select(plate_x, plate_z, hit) %>%
  na.omit()

data_zone <- data_zone %>%
  filter(plate_x >= -0.83, plate_x <= 0.83,
         plate_z >= 1.50, plate_z <= 3.50)

x_breaks <- seq(-0.83, 0.83, by = 0.15)
z_breaks <- seq(1.50, 3.50, by = 0.15)

data_zone <- data_zone %>%
  mutate(
    x_bin = cut(plate_x, breaks = x_breaks, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE),
    z_bin = cut(plate_z, breaks = z_breaks, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE)
  )
alpha_prior <- 2
beta_prior  <- 8

zone_summary <- data_zone %>%
  group_by(x_bin, z_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pitches = n(),
    hits = sum(hit),
    misses = n_pitches - hits,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    post_alpha = alpha_prior + hits,
    post_beta  = beta_prior + misses,
    posterior_mean = post_alpha / (post_alpha + post_beta),
    posterior_lower = qbeta(0.025, post_alpha, post_beta),
    posterior_upper = qbeta(0.975, post_alpha, post_beta)
  )

get_midpoint <- function(bin_label) {
  nums <- gsub("\\[|\\)|\\]|\\(", "", bin_label)
  parts <- strsplit(nums, ",")[[1]]
  mean(as.numeric(parts))
}

zone_summary <- zone_summary %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    x_mid = get_midpoint(x_bin),
    z_mid = get_midpoint(z_bin)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

best_zone <- zone_summary %>%
  filter(n_pitches >= 10) %>%
  arrange(posterior_mean) %>%
  slice(1)

cat("Best pitch location:\n")
cat("plate_x =", round(best_zone$x_mid, 3), "\n")
cat("plate_z =", round(best_zone$z_mid, 3), "\n")
cat("Posterior mean hit probability =", round(best_zone$posterior_mean, 4), "\n")
cat("95% credible interval = [",
    round(best_zone$posterior_lower, 4), ", ",
    round(best_zone$posterior_upper, 4), "]\n", sep = "")

strike_zone <- data.frame(
  xmin = -0.83,
  xmax =  0.83,
  ymin =  1.50,
  ymax =  3.50
)

ggplot(zone_summary, aes(x = x_mid, y = z_mid, fill = posterior_mean)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_rect(
    data = strike_zone,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = best_zone,
    aes(x = x_mid, y = z_mid),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "red",
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "blue",
    high = "darkred",
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x, 1), "%"),
    name = "Posterior\nhit probability"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Bayesian Heatmap of Hit Probability",
    subtitle = "Beta-Binomial model with Beta(2, 8) prior",
    x = "Horizontal pitch location",
    y = "Vertical pitch location"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

zone_summary %>%
  filter(n_pitches >= 10) %>%
  arrange(posterior_mean) %>%
  select(x_mid, z_mid, n_pitches, hits, posterior_mean, posterior_lower, posterior_upper) %>%
  head(10)
zone_summary <- zone_summary %>%
  mutate(observed_rate = hits / n_pitches)

mean(abs(zone_summary$posterior_mean - zone_summary$observed_rate))
```
